page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d2s.20xlarge is a storage-optimized instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor. It features 80 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture running at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz with a single thread per core. The instance is equipped with 352.0 GB of RAM, providing approximately 4.4 GB of memory per core, and operates on the KVM hypervisor.

A defining characteristic of this server is its massive local storage capacity, offering 235,149 GB of HDD storage. This high-density local storage is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 35 Gbps, enabling high-throughput data transfers. The instance does not include any GPU hardware.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.d2s.20xlarge provides a high density of local HDD storage relative to its compute and memory resources, making it a specialized option for workloads requiring massive capacity without the premium cost of SSDs. It is designed for large-scale data warehousing, distributed file systems, big data analytics, and cold storage databases where sequential disk throughput and high capacity are prioritized over random I/O performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d2s.20xlarge is a storage-optimized server featuring 80 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is configured with 352.0 GB of RAM, translating to 4.4 GB per core, and runs on the KVM hypervisor. The primary differentiator of this instance is its massive local storage capacity of 235,149 GB on HDD media, supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 35 Gbps. Lacking GPU acceleration, this server is designed for high-capacity storage workloads. It offers a cost-efficient profile for massive data retention, making it highly suitable for distributed file systems, large-scale data warehousing, big data processing, and cold storage databases requiring high sequential disk throughput.

tagline: A high-capacity storage instance featuring eighty dedicated cores and over two hundred and thirty terabytes of local HDD storage.

352.0 GB of system memory (4.4 GB per core)
Massive 235,149 GB of local HDD storage capacity
Designed for distributed file systems and big data analytics
